title: [SYNTHETIC FIXTURE] Will the example agency's monthly index exceed 3% in each of the following months?

group_of_questions.description: Synthetic fixture group for offline tests. Shaped like a MiniBench group question; never submitted anywhere. The framing below is stated once on the parent and overrides each subquestion.
group_of_questions.resolution_criteria: Each subquestion resolves YES if the example agency's published monthly index for that month exceeds 3.0%.
group_of_questions.fine_print: The first published value is used; subsequent revisions are ignored.
